name: Microsoft 365
description: Read mail, calendars, and chats, and opt in to narrowly scoped Microsoft Graph writes.

capabilities.description: Search message metadata. No send, edit, move, or delete access.
Create unsent mail drafts. Cannot send, move, or delete mail.
Read calendar events. No create, edit, or delete access.
Create or edit calendar events. Cannot delete events or respond to invitations.
List chats and read bounded message history. Cannot create, edit, or delete chats or messages.
Send a plain-text message to an existing chat. Cannot create chats or edit or delete messages.

tools.name: microsoft365.mail.search
tools.description: Search recent Microsoft 365 mail with a bounded read-only query.

tools.name: microsoft365.mail.draft.create
tools.description: Create one unsent, plain-text Microsoft 365 mail draft.

tools.name: microsoft365.calendar.events
tools.description: Read Microsoft 365 calendar events in a bounded date range.

tools.name: microsoft365.calendar.event.update
tools.description: Edit the subject, time, location, or attendee list on one Microsoft 365 calendar event.

tools.name: microsoft365.chat.list
tools.description: List a bounded number of the user's Microsoft 365 chats.

tools.name: microsoft365.chat.messages
tools.description: Read a bounded number of messages from one Microsoft 365 chat.

tools.name: microsoft365.chat.message.send
tools.description: Send one plain-text message to an existing Microsoft 365 chat.

skills.name: microsoft-365-mail
skills.description: Search Microsoft 365 mail or create an unsent draft through TritonAI Harness. Use when the user asks to review, search, or triage mail, or to prepare an email draft without sending it.

skills.name: microsoft-365-calendar
skills.description: Read, create, or edit Microsoft 365 calendar events through TritonAI Harness. Use when the user asks about their schedule or requests a new or changed calendar event.

skills.name: microsoft-365-chat
skills.description: Read Microsoft 365 chats or send a message to an existing chat through TritonAI Harness. Use when the user asks to review Microsoft Teams chats, read chat history, or send a chat reply.
